title: Check behind your master bedroom mirror.
alternativeTitles: The house guest I never invited.
Who is living behind my bedroom wall?
The secret my new house was hiding.
Found something terrifying in my mirror.
Don't ignore the master bedroom mirror.
Something is living in the walls.
The mystery of the room that wasn't there.
My home has a secret tenant.
Did I just discover a time glitch?
Why you should never trust your mirrors.
description: After moving into my new home, I discovered a hidden space behind the master bedroom mirror that proves I am not living here alone. Did you catch the glitch in the photos? Follow for daily mysteries and strange discoveries. #mystery #horror #glitchinthematrix #creepy #hauntedhouse
